text.title: Adobe Firefly Creative Cloud Integration Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the adobe-firefly-integration methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Prompts MUST follow a structured taxonomy (subject + style + lighting + composition + brand-tokens).
Generated assets MUST pass brand audit (logo presence / forbidden imagery / colour adherence) before entering the asset library.
rule.rationale: Asset libraries become trust contracts; ungated drift erodes them.

rule.statement: Pipeline MUST pin to Firefly Image v3+ commercial-safe model.
rule.rationale: Custom-model output voids Adobe IP indemnity.

rule.statement: Every imported asset MUST carry prompt hash + model version + designer.
Failed brand-audit assets MUST go to a review queue, not silent discard.
rule.rationale: Silent discard hides systematic prompt failures.

rule.statement: When preconditions hold, run the full procedure end-to-end and emit the output artefact.
rule.rationale: Routes positive decision-tree leaves to the procedure.

rule.statement: When preconditions fail or skip-conditions hold, exit without producing the artefact and document why.
rule.rationale: Routes negative decision-tree leaves out without polluting the output channel.
